servers.name: FreeIdeaStore
servers.description: AI agent tools for FreeIdeaStore. Create ideas, read idea research, add evidence, propose refinements, react with support/trash/pivot signals, and promote mature ideas toward ProIdeaStore.

tools.name: free_idea_template
tools.description: Return the cheap FreeIdeaStore one-page idea template.

tools.name: get_idea
tools.description: Read a FreeIdeaStore idea body, metadata, and optional contribution history.

tools.name: create_free_idea
tools.description: Create a D1-backed FreeIdeaStore idea page.

tools.name: add_idea_contribution
tools.description: Record evidence, risk, pivot, prototype, refinement, or kill-signal notes on an idea.

tools.name: propose_idea_refinement
tools.description: Record a structured section-level refinement proposal without overwriting the canonical body.

tools.name: react_to_idea
tools.description: Add a support, trash, or pivot signal to an idea.

tools.name: promote_to_pro_candidate
tools.description: Mark an idea as a ProIdeaStore candidate and return a dossier draft.

tools.name: proidea_book_template
tools.description: Return the full ProIdeaStore/Zensical book spine.

tools.name: dry_run_proidea_book_export
tools.description: Dry-run a full Zensical-style book export for a promoted idea.
